key_themes: AI基础设施与上游瓶颈投资

representative_quotes: IMO photonics theme + CW laser chokepoint is goated. ... I'm personally just focusing on that bottleneck.
Humanoid robots, he says, will require roughly ten times more memory than today’s Level 2+ autonomous vehicles.
Feels like all the industry leaders ... see humanoids as the next major trend so physical AI is probably next.

unusual_whales.recent_shift: 近期从关注特朗普行情转向强调伊朗冲突、通胀上升及美联储不降息，市场观点更趋谨慎。
representative_quotes: BREAKING: The Pentagon reportedly delayed announcing the U.S. strikes on Iran until after the stock market closed at 4 p.m. ET on Friday, with the timing intended to minimize the immediate impact on financial markets, according to NBC News.
U.S. inflation climbed to 4.1% in May, per Bloomberg.
JPMorgan has said retail investors are reducing leverage in options and margin accounts after reaching record highs.

key_themes: 存储芯片是AI革命的核心，海力士、美光等存储厂商受益最大

康宁把光互连直接做到自己精通领域的玻璃板里面了，降维打击。
